name: Dr. Aarav Patel
topic: The Quantum Leap: Solving the Unsolvable
bio: Dr. Aarav Patel is a leading researcher in quantum algorithms. His work focuses on practical applications of quantum computing in cryptography and complex system simulation.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: Priya Sharma founded GreenSynth to bridge the gap between technological advancement and environmental sustainability. She advocates for eco-conscious software engineering.

name: Rohan Deshmukh
topic: AI and the Art of Human Connection
bio: Rohan Deshmukh explores the intersection of artificial intelligence and human behavior. His latest projects involve developing empathetic AI systems for mental health support.

name: Ananya Gupta
topic: Designing for the Next Billion Users
bio: Ananya Gupta advocates for inclusive design. She shares insights on creating user interfaces that are accessible, resilient, and engaging for diverse global populations.

name: Vikram Singh
bio: With over a decade of experience in cybersecurity, Vikram Singh discusses emerging threats in the edge computing era and proactive strategies for data protection.

name: Neha Reddy
topic: Mars and Beyond: The New Space Race
bio: Neha Reddy is an aerospace engineer working on propulsion systems for deep space travel. She shares her vision of humanity as a multi-planetary species.
